title: create-kollab-app feature overrides
description: Maintainer-authored metadata that auto-discovery cannot derive from code. Keyed by block slug.

collections.description: Per-collection metadata. Keyed by collection slug.

_note.description: Maintainer note; ignored by the engine.

ownedFiles.description: Repo-relative files/dirs that exist solely to serve this collection (routes, sitemap, heros). Deleted when the collection is pruned. Do NOT list shared files.

patches.description: Find/replace edits applied to SHARED files when this collection is pruned (e.g. neutralize a dynamic import of a deleted module).

group.description: Category shown in the scaffolder selection UI (e.g. Content, Layout, Forms).

title.description: Display title override (only if the block config has no usable label).

description.description: Short description for the selection UI.

requiresCollections.description: Collection slugs this block relates to via bare relationTo strings (no import edge). The scaffolder must keep these collections if this block is kept.

requiresPlugins.description: npm plugin packages that inject collections/fields this block depends on.

onlyInside.description: Slug of the parent block this is a sub-block of (showOnPage:false).

inlineOnly.description: Block is registered via a collection's BlocksFeature (rich text) rather than exports.ts.

modes.description: Reserved for feature modes (e.g. localization none/opt-in/full). Not yet implemented.
